goal: Create scripts/ecr-login.sh that authenticates Docker to the ECR registry in us-east-2.
summary: Created scripts/ecr-login.sh with AWS account detection, default region us-east-2, optional --region argument, docker login via aws ecr get-login-password, made it executable, and validated syntax with bash -n.
stepSummaries:
1. Create scripts/ecr-login.sh with AWS account detection, default region us-east-2, optional --region argument, and docker login command. [verified]
